title: cota macrantha var. vitellina
intro: Cota macrantha var. vitellina, also known as the yellow hawk's beard, is a perennial flower that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Cota macrantha var. vitellina include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
